flow-definition.description: Enables or disables Explore without Login. Updates frontend, PSAMA, and Wildfly configuration, rebuilds the frontend, and restarts PIC-SURE.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Set to true to enable Explore without Login. Set to false to disable it.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: CONFIRM_PUBLIC_DATA
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: I know what I am doing and accept that all of my data will be publicly available

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: FRONTEND_GIT_HASH
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Git branch or commit hash for the frontend build. The frontend must be rebuilt to pick up the new environment variables.
